title: StopServiceResponse
description: Response to a stop service request, sent by the station to the app via BLE characteristic FFF4 (Notify). Confirms or rejects the service stop and provides final usage data.

result.description: Outcome of the stop service request

actualDurationSeconds.description: Actual duration the service ran in seconds, present when result is Accepted

creditsCharged.description: Total credits charged for the service, present when result is Accepted
